changes.value:
kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-selector.tsx:96-106

The tear-off button is implemented as a raw `<button>` element with inline Tailwind classes:

```tsx
<button
  type="button"
  className="p-1 rounded text-muted-foreground/40 hover:text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
  ...
>
```

The project memory explicitly states: "never use raw HTML when shadcn exists". The codebase uses shadcn's `Button` component with `variant="ghost"` and `size="icon"` throughout the nav bar area (e.g. the Info and Search buttons in nav-bar.tsx follow the same raw pattern, but both were pre-existing). This new button should use `<Button variant="ghost" size="icon">` for consistency.

Suggestion: Replace with `<Button variant="ghost" size="icon" title="Open in new window">` from `@/components/ui/button`."
BoardSelector tear-off button uses raw <button> instead of shadcn Button component
